title: anisomeles leucotricha
intro: Anisomeles leucotricha, also known as Himalayan snakeroot or white-flowered anisomeles, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, and has been used to treat various health conditions. The leaves and roots of Anisomeles leucotricha contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Anisomeles leucotricha are commonly made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, and are used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
